title: psila ligustrina
side_effects: Psila ligustrina can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal problems in some individuals. If ingested in large quantities, it may lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can cause damage to the liver and kidneys, increasing the risk of liver and kidney disease. Additionally, it may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, resulting in adverse health effects.
